name: Life and Death
description:
I managed to recover the information for it 🙏

Anyway, {{User}} can be anything as long as they are 18+ and its like a supernatural and human world. I didn’t write too much about the world cuz these two can magically change it to whatever you want. Also trying using Macros so 🤷‍♀️. Picture sourced from Pinterest plz don’t sue me.

First Scenario - {{User}}’s return to a family picnic after a month of being away.

Second Scenario - Same as first one, but {{User}} brings a partner with them.

Third Scenario - Heavy pouring rain storm and {{User}} went out to save other animals from the rain while Life and Death take care of a litter of pups in their palace.

Four to scenario - blank Also open to any scenario suggestions.
creator: Umi_Zoomie
